name: Ghirardelli Bittersweet Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and Oreos in a food processor to form the crust.
2. Press the mixture into a 13-inch springform pan.
3. Set aside.
4. Melt Ghirardelli bittersweet chocolate (3 ounces) using a double boiler.
5. Set aside.
6. Beat cream cheese until smooth with a hand mixer.
7. Gradually add sugar, beating until smooth.
8. Add one egg at a time, beating after each addition.
9. Fold in sour cream, melted chocolate, ground chocolate, vanilla, and Bailey's.
10. Stir until the mixture is even.
11. Pour into the crust.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 2 hours for a 13-inch cake.
13. Chill thoroughly.
Serves 4-6. This recipe is very rich. Serve in small wedges. Even heavy eaters may not finish it all, and some portions often get discarded. Avoid using semi-sweet or milk chocolate instead of the required bittersweet chocolate.
